equipment_starting.description: Starting equipment determined by culture and social class. Starting money multiplied by social class Money Modifier.
equipment_starting.money_modifier_note: Multiply starting money by the Money Modifier from social class. Additional money from modifier may be goods/chattels rather than coin at GM discretion.

equipment_by_class.clothing: One set of ragged, probably dirty clothes
equipment_by_class.weapons: One well used weapon of provenance suitable to origin
equipment_by_class.armour: Roll 1d6-3. If > 0, outworn armour worth that many AP covering 1d3 locations. Otherwise none.

equipment_by_class.clothing: One or two sets of clothes suitable for position and work
Two sets of common, undecorated clothes suitable to occupation
equipment_by_class.weapons: 1d2 simple weapons suited to culture (axes, clubs, knives, spears, slings)
equipment_by_class.armour: Roll 1d3. Represents AP for armour covering 1d6 locations.
equipment_by_class.transport: Own back, Raft, Handcart or Beast of Burden

equipment_by_class.clothing: 1d6+1 sets of good quality clothing with modest decoration
equipment_by_class.weapons: 1d3+1 weapons of higher status/quality (swords, maces, shields, bows, great weapons)
equipment_by_class.armour: Full set of protection worth 1d2+2 AP
equipment_by_class.transport: Hired or Slave Porter, Boat, Wagon or Riding Mount

equipment_by_class.clothing: 1d6+3 sets of expensive clothing with lots of decoration
equipment_by_class.weapons: 1d3+3 weapons of expensive quality, decorated with precious substances
equipment_by_class.armour: Full set of protection worth 1d2+3 AP
equipment_by_class.transport: Palanquin, Ship, Chariot or Several Fine Mounts

equipment_by_class.clothing: 1d6+6 sets of rare, priceless materials, as opulent as good taste allows
equipment_by_class.weapons: 1d3+6 weapons of exquisite craftsmanship, priceless due to heredity or materials
equipment_by_class.armour: Full set of protection worth 1d2+4 AP
equipment_by_class.transport: Expensive Palanquin with matched Bearers, Warship, Exquisite Carriage or Several Magnificent Mounts
